metadata.heist_focus: door timing, key routing, fake prisoner noises, and divided jail corridors
metadata.coordination_problem: split party lock puzzle with scout information, kobold mechanisms, boggart decoys, and ogre body-blocking
metadata.goblin_aesthetic: ringing keyhooks, low cell doors, stolen lock oil, goblin chalk marks, and whispering jail vents

entry_warren.name: Goblin Entry Warren
entry_warren.description: A cramped goblin approach lined with ringing keyhooks, low cell doors, stolen lock oil, goblin chalk marks, and whispering jail vents.

mischief_lane.name: Mischief Lane
mischief_lane.description: The main coordination lane for door timing, key routing, fake prisoner noises, and divided jail corridors.

objective_hold.name: Master Keyring Post
objective_hold.description: Lift the master keyring from the lock captain's peg and get out before the whole lockhouse wakes.

furniture.name: Goblin Chalk Shadow
furniture.description: Goblin Chalk Shadow supports door timing, key routing, fake prisoner noises, and divided jail corridors.

furniture.message: A chalk arrow tells the next goblin where not to squeak.

break_effect.message: Goblin Chalk Shadow breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Whistling Key Peg
furniture.description: Whistling Key Peg supports door timing, key routing, fake prisoner noises, and divided jail corridors.

furniture.message: The key peg stops whistling and starts lying.

break_effect.message: Whistling Key Peg breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Cell Echo Vent
furniture.description: Cell Echo Vent supports door timing, key routing, fake prisoner noises, and divided jail corridors.

furniture.message: The vent repeats a dwarf-sized complaint in the wrong corridor.

break_effect.message: Cell Echo Vent breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

scripts.coordination_contract: split party lock puzzle with scout information, kobold mechanisms, boggart decoys, and ogre body-blocking

achievements.title: Quiet Toolwork
achievements.description: Resolve a mechanism or alarm feature in Tinwhistle Lockhouse pico without turning the run into a brawl.

achievements.title: Mischief Coordination
achievements.description: Create a distraction or trap setup that opens the Tinwhistle Lockhouse route.

achievements.title: Snack Tax With Interest
achievements.description: Take optional loot while still completing the pico heist.
